title: tapheocarpa calandrinioides
intro: Tapheocarpa calandrinioides is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Tapheocarpa calandrinioides include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams, making it a versatile remedy for various health needs.
